column7: Specific mirror rule. Checked before generic MIRROR.
Mirror headers route to Mirror/BFS mirror bays.
Annealed headers route to Mirror/BFS mirror bays.
Tempered headers route to blue bays 12-16.
Coral is not auto-assigned in v1.
Use when no recognized header/category is found.
